name: model_vision_openai
description: OpenAI vision-capable LLM (gpt-4o) for image modality. Accepts messages with image content parts.

inputs.name: messages
inputs.description: OpenAI-format messages; content may include {type:'image_url', image_url:{url:...}} parts

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: convenience: list of {url} or {base64} dicts to attach to last user message

summary_md: Vision-capable LLM wrapper (gpt-4o). Routed by inference.modality_providers.image. Other providers (anthropic, opencode-zen-claude-sonnet) can be added as parallel vision neuros.
